creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch included in PR was somehow broken (by GNATS?); attached is a fixed  
patch.

I've tested this in poudriere jails for FreeBSD versions 7.4 and 8.3. It  
builds with base OpenSSL showing no obvious issues. I don't have an  
infrastructure available to test the OpenSSL module, but I don't suspect  
there to be any problems.

I accept this patch to the port.
